hypothesis: Introducing aromatic residues at position 5 and charged residues at position 6 will enhance binding affinity by optimizing hydrophobic and electrostatic interactions with the SSTR2 receptor.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: Structural quality is more critical than previously assumed; need to explicitly optimize pLDDT alongside ddG

proposed_changes.rationale: Reduce structural clashes that may be causing poor pLDDT scores
Prioritize both ddG and pLDDT to balance binding affinity with model quality
